imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Ethereal muzzle flash effect with soft glow in muted gold tones (muzzle-flash.dim_256x256.png)
- Atmospheric skybox texture with timeless, foggy environment in pale blue and gray (skybox.dim_2048x2048.png)
- Crosshair overlay design with minimalist style in semi-transparent white (crosshair.dim_64x64.png)

existing_features.title: Implement a 3D first-person shooter game environment using React Three Fiber with controllable player movement (WASD keys for forward/backward/strafe, mouse for looking around)
Add shooting mechanics with visual feedback including muzzle flash, projectile trajectories, and hit detection against targets
Create a 3D game arena with obstacles, cover positions, and environmental geometry for tactical gameplay
Implement enemy targets or NPCs that can be destroyed when shot, with visual feedback for hits and destruction
Add game state management tracking player health, ammunition count, score, and enemy defeats
Display HUD elements showing crosshair, health bar, ammunition counter, and current score
Apply a timeless, ethereal visual aesthetic with muted colors, atmospheric lighting, and a sense of suspended time to create a distinctive art style
